headline: RPG Investment Advisory Opens Centrus Energy Stake Valued at $9 Million, According to Recent SEC Filing
summary: Centrus gives investors rare exposure to the bottleneck behind nuclear fuel: uranium enrichment. The next hurdle is turning contracts, centrifuge manufacturing, and the Piketon expansion into production capacity.

raw.headline: RPG Investment Advisory Opens Centrus Energy Stake Valued at $9 Million, According to Recent SEC Filing
raw.summary: Centrus gives investors rare exposure to the bottleneck behind nuclear fuel: uranium enrichment. The next hurdle is turning contracts, centrifuge manufacturing, and the Piketon expansion into production capacity.

headline: Is Quanta Services (PWR) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Quanta Services (PWR) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
